preferred_name_ml.fr: Tête de connexion de transmetteur de température

definition: instrument component comprising an enclosure with facilities for the electrical connection of sensing element and output cable that also provides protection against dust, moisture and corrosion

definition_ml.en: instrument component comprising an enclosure with facilities for the electrical connection of sensing element and output cable that also provides protection against dust, moisture and corrosion
definition_ml.fr: tête de connexion pour un transmetteur de température

note: The connection facilities may be a terminal block or another instrument component such as a head-mounted transmitter. Some connection heads also provide for the mechanical connection of an insert.

note_ml.en: The connection facilities may be a terminal block or another instrument component such as a head-mounted transmitter. Some connection heads also provide for the mechanical connection of an insert.

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: instrument component comprising an enclosure with facilities for the electrical connection of sensing element and output cable that also provides protection against dust, moisture and corrosion
